R Notebook

library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
setFixest_notes(FALSE)
source("../emileRegs.R")

Data

myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
# Also load full panel for comparison
pwt  <- read_stata("../raw_data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs  <- read_stata("../raw_data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
data_full <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode"))

knot_to_ms <- 0.514444
data <- data_full %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind  = replace_na(max_ann_wind_i_nob, 0) * knot_to_ms,
    energy  = replace_na(sum_ann_energy_i_nob, 0),
    nlands  = replace_na(sum_a_lands_nob, 0),
    loggdp   = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2    = year^2,
    period   = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990")
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 1969) %>%
mutate(
  maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[maxwind > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
  maxwind_95  = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p95),

  maxwind_p99 = quantile(maxwind[maxwind > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
  maxwind_99  = as.integer(maxwind_p99 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p99),

  cat1_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 32.7),
  cat2_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 49.4),
  cat3_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 70.0),

  energy_p95 = quantile(energy[energy > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
  nlands_p95 = quantile(nlands[nlands > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),

  energy_95 = as.integer(energy_p95 > 0 & energy >= energy_p95),
  nlands_95 = as.integer(nlands_p95 > 0 & nlands >= nlands_p95),

  energy_p99 = quantile(energy[energy > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
  nlands_p99 = quantile(nlands[nlands > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),

  energy_99 = as.integer(energy_p99 > 0 & energy >= energy_p99),
  nlands_99 = as.integer(nlands_p99 > 0 & nlands >= nlands_p99),

  region = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "region"),
  region = ifelse(is.na(region), "Other", region),

  continent = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "continent"),
  continent = ifelse(is.na(continent), "Other", continent)
)

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_sd = maxwind / sd(maxwind[maxwind > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sd  = energy  / sd(energy[energy > 0],   na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sd  = nlands  / sd(nlands[nlands > 0],   na.rm = TRUE)
  )


ever_treated_countries <- data %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort()

d_treated <- data %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% ever_treated_countries)

Recovery Time Map

# ── LP: country-level IRFs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
H        <- 10
panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
vcov_fm  <- DK ~ year

irf_list <- vector("list", H + 1)

for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, cat1_plus) + l(gdp_diff,1:2) +l(cat1_plus,1:2) | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year^region,
    data = d_treated,
    panel.id = panel_id,
    vcov = vcov_fm
  )
  
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon  = h,
    term     = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model)
  )
  
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)


irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(horizon[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])),
      min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ -1,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H + 1, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Map ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("adm0_a3" = "country")) %>% 
  #remove Antarctica
  filter(name != "Antarctica")

map_breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
map_labels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")

fig_recovery_map <- ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours  = rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    breaks   = map_breaks,
    limits   = c(0, 12),
    labels   = map_labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name     = "Years to recovery",
    guide    = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight       = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth        = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits     = TRUE,
      title.position  = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 11)
  )

ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time_LP.png",
       fig_recovery_map, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

fig_recovery_map

# Country-level recovery time map using smoothed LP (B-spline on horizon).

H        <- 10
panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
vcov_fm  <- DK ~ year

# ── Estimate raw country-level IRFs ─────────────────────────────────────────
irf_list <- vector("list", H + 1)
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~
      i(countrycode, cat1_plus) + l(gdp_diff, 1:2) + l(cat1_plus, 1:2) |
      countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year^region,
    data     = d_treated,
    panel.id = panel_id,
    vcov     = vcov_fm
  )

  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon  = h,
    term     = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model)
  )

  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2])
}

irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

# ── Smooth each country's IRF over horizon via B-spline ──────────────────────
# Fit a natural cubic spline in horizon for each country,
# then predict on a fine grid to recover a smooth IRF path.

horizons_fine <- seq(0, H, by = 0.1)

irfs_smooth <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  filter(n() == H + 1) %>%                        # need all horizons
  group_modify(~ {
    fit <- smooth.spline(.x$horizon, .x$estimate,
                         df = 5)                   # 5 df = moderate smoothing
    tibble(
      horizon  = horizons_fine,
      estimate = predict(fit, horizons_fine)$y
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Recovery time from smoothed IRF ─────────────────────────────────────────
irf_recovery_smooth <- irfs_smooth %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  summarise(
    first_negative  = if (any(estimate < 0)) min(horizon[estimate < 0])       else NA_real_,
    first_recovered = if (!is.na(first_negative) &
                          any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > first_negative))
                        min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > first_negative]) else NA_real_,
    recovery_time   = case_when(
      is.na(first_negative)  ~ -1,
      is.na(first_recovered) ~ H + 1,
      TRUE                   ~ round(first_recovered - first_negative, 1)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("── Recovery time distribution (smoothed LP) ────────────────────────────\n")
── Recovery time distribution (smoothed LP) ────────────────────────────
print(table(irf_recovery_smooth$recovery_time))

 -1 0.2 0.6 0.7   3 3.2   4 4.3 5.5   6 6.6 7.1 8.8 8.9  11 
  1   1   1   2   1   1   1   1   1   1   2   1   1   1  18 
# ── Map ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery_smooth, by = c("adm0_a3" = "country")) %>%
  filter(name != "Antarctica")

map_breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
map_labels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")

fig_recovery_map_smooth <- ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours  = rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    breaks   = map_breaks,
    limits   = c(0, 12),
    labels   = map_labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name     = "Years to recovery",
    guide    = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight      = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth       = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits    = TRUE,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 11)
  )

ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time_smooth_LP.png",
       fig_recovery_map_smooth, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

fig_recovery_map_smooth

# Raw vs smoothed country-level IRFs for selected countries.

selected_countries <- c("USA", "PHL", "MEX", "DOM", "JPN", "AUS",
                         "IND", "CHN", "BRA", "MDG","CAN")

# ── Raw IRF (discrete horizons) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
irfs_raw_plot <- irfs %>%
  filter(country %in% selected_countries) %>%
  mutate(type = "Raw LP")

# ── Smooth IRF (fine grid) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
irfs_smooth_plot <- irfs_smooth %>%
  filter(country %in% selected_countries) %>%
  mutate(type = "Smooth LP")

# ── Recovery time annotations ────────────────────────────────────────────────
recovery_annot <- irf_recovery_smooth %>%
  filter(country %in% selected_countries) %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      recovery_time == -1    ~ "no drop",
      recovery_time == H + 1 ~ paste0(">", H, "y"),
      TRUE                   ~ paste0(recovery_time, "y")
    )
  )

# ── Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig_country_irfs <- ggplot() +

  # Zero line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.5, color = "grey40") +

  # Raw IRF — points + line
  geom_line(
    data = irfs_raw_plot,
    aes(x = horizon, y = estimate),
    color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = irfs_raw_plot,
    aes(x = horizon, y = estimate),
    color = "grey50", size = 1.4, shape = 16
  ) +

  # Smooth IRF — colored line
  geom_line(
    data = irfs_smooth_plot,
    aes(x = horizon, y = estimate),
    color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  # Recovery time label
  geom_text(
    data = recovery_annot,
    aes(label = paste0("T* = ", label)),
    x = H - 0.5, y = Inf,
    hjust = 1, vjust = 1.6,
    size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "steelblue"
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~country, ncol = 5, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, H, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x, 1), "%")) +
  labs(
    title    = "Raw vs smoothed country-level IRF",
    subtitle = "Grey = raw LP; blue = smooth spline (df=5); T* = years to recovery",
    x        = "Horizon (years)",
    y        = "GDP response"
  ) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10))

ggsave("figures/irf_country_raw_vs_smooth.png",
       fig_country_irfs, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

fig_country_irfs

TWO STAGE

# Two-stage country IRFs: (1) residualize loggdp on FEs + trends,
# (2) estimate per-country LP of maxwind_95 on residualized outcome.

# ── Stage 1: Residualize loggdp onto FEs and country-specific trends ─────────
d_treated <- d_treated %>%
  mutate(
    loggdp_resid = resid(lm(
      loggdp ~ countrycode + countrycode:year + countrycode:year2 + region:factor(year),
      data = .,
      na.action = na.exclude
    ))
  )

cat(sprintf("Residualization R²: %.3f\n", 1 - var(resid(fe_resid)) / var(data$loggdp, na.rm = TRUE)))
Residualization R²: 0.994
# ── Stage 2: Per-country LP on residualized outcome ──────────────────────────
H           <- 10
horizons_fine <- seq(0, H, by = 0.1)

countries_est <- d_treated %>%
  filter(!is.na(loggdp_resid), !is.na(cat1_plus)) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    sum(cat1_plus, na.rm = TRUE) >= 2,   # at least 2 shock events
    n() >= 15                              # at least 15 years of data
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  unique()

cat(sprintf("Countries with sufficient data: %d\n", length(countries_est)))
Countries with sufficient data: 28
# Estimate one LP per country per horizon
irf_list <- vector("list", length(countries_est))

for (i in seq_along(countries_est)) {
  cty  <- countries_est[i]
  d_c  <- d_treated %>%
    filter(countrycode == cty) %>%
    arrange(year) %>%
    mutate(
      gdp_resid_diff = loggdp_resid - lag(loggdp_resid, 1)
    )

  coefs <- map_dfr(0:H, function(h) {
    y_h <- lead(d_c$loggdp_resid, h) - lag(d_c$loggdp_resid, 1)

    # Controls: lagged residual growth + lagged shock
    df_h <- data.frame(
      y        = y_h,
      shock    = d_c$cat1_plus,
      lag1_dy  = lag(d_c$gdp_resid_diff, 1),
      lag2_dy  = lag(d_c$gdp_resid_diff, 2),
      lag1_d   = lag(d_c$cat1_plus, 1),
      lag2_d   = lag(d_c$cat1_plus, 2)
    ) %>% filter(complete.cases(.))

    if (nrow(df_h) < 8 || var(df_h$shock) == 0) return(NULL)

    tryCatch({
      mod  <- lm(y ~ shock + lag1_dy + lag2_dy + lag1_d + lag2_d, data = df_h)
      beta <- coef(mod)["shock"]
      se   <- sqrt(vcov(mod)["shock", "shock"])
      tibble(
        horizon  = h,
        estimate = beta,
        se       = se,
        lo       = beta - 1.96 * se,
        hi       = beta + 1.96 * se
      )
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  })

  if (nrow(coefs) == H + 1)
    irf_list[[i]] <- coefs %>% mutate(country = cty)
}

irfs_2stage <- bind_rows(irf_list)
cat(sprintf("Countries with complete IRFs: %d\n", n_distinct(irfs_2stage$country)))
Countries with complete IRFs: 27
# ── Smooth each country's IRF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
irfs_2stage_smooth <- irfs_2stage %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    fit <- smooth.spline(.x$horizon, .x$estimate, df = 5)
    tibble(
      horizon  = horizons_fine,
      estimate = predict(fit, horizons_fine)$y
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Recovery time from smoothed IRF ──────────────────────────────────────────
irf_recovery_2stage <- irfs_2stage_smooth %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  summarise(
    first_negative  = if (any(estimate < 0)) min(horizon[estimate < 0])       else NA_real_,
    first_recovered = if (!is.na(first_negative) &
                          any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > first_negative))
                        min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > first_negative]) else NA_real_,
    recovery_time   = case_when(
      is.na(first_negative)  ~ -1,
      is.na(first_recovered) ~ H + 1,
      TRUE                   ~ round(first_recovered - first_negative, 1)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Map ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
world_joined_2stage <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery_2stage, by = c("adm0_a3" = "country")) %>%
  filter(name != "Antarctica")

map_breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
map_labels  <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")

fig_map_2stage <- ggplot(world_joined_2stage) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours  = rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    breaks   = map_breaks,
    limits   = c(0, 12),
    labels   = map_labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name     = "Years to recovery",
    guide    = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight      = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth       = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits    = TRUE,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 11)
  )

ggsave("figures/map_recovery_2stage.png",
       fig_map_2stage, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ── Raw vs smooth comparison for selected countries ───────────────────────────
selected_countries <- c("USA", "PHL", "MEX", "DOM", "JPN", "AUS",
                         "IND", "CHN", "BRA", "MDG")

selected_countries <- intersect(selected_countries, irfs_2stage$country)

recovery_annot <- irf_recovery_2stage %>%
  filter(country %in% selected_countries) %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      recovery_time == -1    ~ "no drop",
      recovery_time == H + 1 ~ paste0(">", H, "y"),
      TRUE                   ~ paste0(recovery_time, "y")
    )
  )

fig_country_2stage <- ggplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.5, color = "grey40") +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irfs_2stage %>% filter(country %in% selected_countries),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = irfs_2stage %>% filter(country %in% selected_countries),
    aes(x = horizon, y = estimate),
    color = "grey55", linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = irfs_2stage %>% filter(country %in% selected_countries),
    aes(x = horizon, y = estimate),
    color = "grey45", size = 1.4, shape = 16
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = irfs_2stage_smooth %>% filter(country %in% selected_countries),
    aes(x = horizon, y = estimate),
    color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = recovery_annot,
    aes(label = paste0("T* = ", label)),
    x = H - 0.3, y = Inf,
    hjust = 1, vjust = 1.6,
    size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "steelblue"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~country, ncol = 5, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, H, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x, 1), "%")) +
  labs(
    title    = "Two-stage LP: raw vs smoothed country IRFs",
    subtitle = "Grey = raw OLS + 95% CI; blue = smooth spline (df=5); T* = years to recovery",
    x        = "Horizon (years)",
    y        = "GDP response (residualized)"
  ) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10))

ggsave("figures/irf_country_2stage_smooth.png",
       fig_country_2stage, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
